meta.title: Group Benefits Administration
meta.catalog: Majesco Group & Voluntary Benefits — Administration Best-Practice Catalog

steps.activity: Signed proposal received from group client
steps.output: Proposal filed; implementation timeline agreed; kickoff scheduled
Benefits schedule, eligibility rules and pricing confirmed; subgroups defined

steps.activity: Master policy drafted and reviewed by Compliance
steps.output: Wording approved; benefits schedule attached; executed via DocuSign

steps.activity: Group configured in PAS and billing system
steps.output: Master policy number; benefit codes, eligibility rules and billing cycle loaded
Training on data submission format and portal access; admin guide distributed

steps.activity: Initial member data file received and processed
steps.output: Member records loaded; certificates generated and dispatched to group admin

steps.activity: Monthly member data file received from group admin
steps.output: File received by 5th; format validated against agreed template

steps.activity: Data file processed: additions, deletions, amendments
steps.output: Changes effective per file date; PAS updated; billing adjusted
Errors returned to group admin within 2 days; corrected file within 5 days

steps.activity: Monthly group invoice generated and dispatched
steps.output: Invoice reflects current member count and benefit level; sent by 10th
Payment matched to invoice; exceptions resolved; GL posted in SAP
Loss ratio, claims experience and membership trend; pricing recommendation

steps.activity: Renewal terms presented to group client
steps.output: Renewal meeting; revised benefits schedule and premium presented
Master policy endorsed or reissued; new anniversary confirmed in PAS

swim_phases.name: New programme setup
swim_phases.subtitle: Steps 1–6 · structure to enrolment
swim_phases.note: New programmes are underwritten, documented and configured before the group administrator is onboarded and members are loaded.

swim_phases.name: Ongoing member administration
swim_phases.subtitle: Steps 7–11 · enrolment & billing
swim_phases.note: A monthly flat file drives enrolment changes and list-bill invoicing; discrepancies are returned for correction within five days.

swim_phases.name: Annual renewal
swim_phases.subtitle: Steps 12–14 · analysis to acceptance
swim_phases.note: Renewals are priced on experience, presented to the client, and documented; declines invoke master-policy run-off.

items.name: Group programme intake
items.detail: Signed-proposal intake with implementation timeline aligns with Majesco group case setup.

items.name: Group underwriting & benefit design
items.detail: Benefits schedule, eligibility rules and subgroup structure align with Majesco plan configuration.

items.name: Master policy & compliance
items.detail: Compliance-reviewed master wording executed via DocuSign aligns with Majesco contract management.

items.name: Employee self-service enrolment
items.detail: Enrolment is administrator-mediated only. Majesco provides employee self-service enrolment with real-time eligibility — without it, member experience and data quality suffer.

items.name: Group administrator onboarding
items.detail: Portal training and admin guide for data submission align with Majesco group-admin onboarding.

items.name: Member data integration (EDI/API)
items.detail: Member changes arrive as a monthly flat file. Majesco ingests EDI 834 / API feeds for near-real-time, validated enrolment — the flat file delays changes and increases error.

items.name: Eligibility & dependent verification
items.detail: Format is validated but eligibility and dependent records are not systematically verified at ingest, as the catalog requires to prevent ineligible coverage.

items.name: Discrepancy resolution
items.detail: Discrepancies are worked manually with the group admin. Majesco auto-validates files and routes only true exceptions with a self-correct portal.

items.name: List-bill invoicing
items.detail: Member-level list-bill invoicing reflecting current count and benefit aligns with Majesco group billing.

items.name: Reconciliation & retro adjustments
items.detail: Payments are reconciled to invoice, but retroactive add/term adjustments are manual. Majesco automates retro premium and self-bill/list-bill reconciliation.

items.name: Evidence of insurability (EOI)
items.detail: No EOI workflow for voluntary/over-guarantee benefit elections. Majesco routes EOI to underwriting and gates coverage until approved — a leakage and compliance gap.

items.name: Experience-based renewal
items.detail: Loss-ratio, claims-experience and trend analysis with actuarial pricing align with Majesco renewal analytics.

items.name: Renewal documentation
items.detail: Endorsed/reissued master policy with new anniversary aligns with Majesco renewal processing.

critical_missing.title: EDI/API member data integration
critical_missing.detail: Enrolment changes arrive as a monthly flat file, delaying coverage updates and increasing error. The catalog ingests EDI 834 / API feeds with validation for near-real-time enrolment.

critical_missing.title: Employee self-service enrolment
critical_missing.detail: Enrolment is administrator-mediated; there is no employee self-service with real-time eligibility, hurting member experience and data quality.

critical_missing.title: Evidence of insurability (EOI)
critical_missing.detail: No EOI workflow for voluntary/over-guarantee elections; coverage is not gated on underwriting approval, a leakage and compliance gap.

critical_missing.title: Eligibility & dependent verification
critical_missing.detail: Files are format-checked but eligibility and dependents are not systematically verified at ingest, risking ineligible coverage and claims leakage.

control_bars.name: Enrolment integration
control_bars.note: Monthly flat file; no EDI/API or self-service

control_bars.name: Eligibility verification
control_bars.note: Format checked; no systematic eligibility check

control_bars.name: Evidence of insurability
control_bars.note: No EOI workflow for voluntary elections

remediations.title: Implement EDI 834 / API member integration
remediations.detail: Replace the monthly flat file with EDI 834 / API feeds and validation for near-real-time, accurate enrolment. Effort: 6 weeks (integration).

remediations.title: Launch employee self-service enrolment
remediations.detail: Provide an employee self-service portal with real-time eligibility, open-enrolment windows and life-event changes. Effort: 7 weeks.

remediations.title: Add evidence-of-insurability (EOI) workflow
remediations.detail: Route voluntary/over-guarantee elections to underwriting and gate coverage until EOI approval. Effort: 4 weeks.

remediations.title: Automate eligibility & dependent verification
remediations.detail: Verify eligibility and dependents at ingest against rules and source data, blocking ineligible coverage. Effort: 4 weeks.

remediations.title: Automate retro adjustments & reconciliation
remediations.detail: Automate retroactive premium add/term adjustments and self-bill/list-bill reconciliation. Effort: 4 weeks.

Member-level invoice with automated retro add/term adjustments
Payment matched; self-bill/list-bill reconciled; GL posted
Loss ratio, experience and trend; pricing recommendation

Master policy endorsed/reissued; new anniversary confirmed

opt_swim_phases.note: v2.0 turns on employee self-service enrolment with real-time eligibility for initial member loading.

optimised_doc.subtitle: Optimised per Fit-Gap Analysis against the Majesco Group & Voluntary Benefits Catalog

blocks: OPTIMISATION SUMMARY — What changed in v2.0

This version incorporates 5 remediation actions from Fit-Gap Report FG-INS-006. Alignment to the Majesco group benefits catalog increased from 67% to 90%. Critical additions: EDI 834 / API member integration, employee self-service enrolment, an evidence-of-insurability (EOI) workflow, automated eligibility/dependent verification, and automated retro adjustments.
NEW STEP (green) — step added to close a gap vs the Majesco catalog
ENHANCED (amber) — existing step updated with additional automation or controls

sections.title: 1. Purpose
blocks: This Standard Operating Procedure defines the process for developing, onboarding, administering and renewing group insurance programmes. Version 2.0 incorporates optimisations from fit-gap analysis against the Majesco Group & Voluntary Benefits Administration Best-Practice Catalog, achieving 90% alignment (up from 67% in v1.2).

sections.title: 2. Scope
blocks: This procedure applies to new group programme setup, member enrolment changes throughout the year, annual renewal and premium renegotiation, and group billing reconciliation.
Scope extended: EDI/API member integration, self-service enrolment and EOI now apply to every member change.
This procedure does NOT cover voluntary individual policies under a group master (SOP-INS-004) or reinsurance treaty administration.

sections.title: 4. Roles and Responsibilities
blocks: Owns the client relationship; leads design and renewal; coordinates internal teams.
Ingests EDI/self-service enrolment; verifies eligibility; resolves exceptions; reconciles billing.
Configures the programme; issues the master policy; sets billing with Finance.
Owns EOI dispositions and non-standard benefit design.
Reviews master wording and regulatory requirements.

sections.title: 5. Enrolment & EOI Controls (New Section — v2.0)
blocks: New section. Required by the Majesco catalog. EDI/API enrolment, eligibility verification and EOI now gate member coverage.
Voluntary elections gated on UW approval

sections.title: 6. Process Steps
blocks: Group configured in PAS and billing

sections.title: 7. Exception Handling
blocks: With EDI/API feeds, missing-file risk is largely eliminated; residual gaps are flagged automatically.
If a feed gap is detected, the system alerts the Application Processor the same day.
Unresolved by the 10th: Group Account Manager escalates to the client HR contact.
Billing uses prior-period membership provisionally, subject to retroactive adjustment.
30-day arrears: formal written notice to the group administrator.
60-day arrears: Account Manager engages the client; payment plan with Finance Director approval.
90-day arrears: programme suspended; members notified that coverage is under review.
Master-policy run-off provisions apply; claims incurred before expiry honoured to the run-off period.
Member data archived per retention policy; group-admin portal access revoked.

sections.title: 8. Systems and Tools
blocks: Premium GL posting and accounts receivable
Group account management and renewal tracking

sections.title: 9. Key Controls and Audit Points
blocks: Controls expanded in v2.0: EDI/API enrolment, eligibility verification, EOI gating, and automated retro reconciliation.
Enrolment integration: validated EDI/API feeds replace the monthly flat file.
Eligibility gate: ineligible members and dependents blocked at ingest.
EOI gate: voluntary/over-guarantee coverage withheld until underwriting approval.
Self-service: members manage elections with real-time eligibility.
Retro reconciliation: retroactive add/term premium adjusted automatically.
Segregation of duties: enrolment ≠ EOI disposition ≠ billing reconciliation.
Immutable audit trail: enrolment, EOI, billing and renewal events logged.

sections.title: 11. Document Control
blocks: Added arrears escalation protocol; updated renewal steps with actuarial sign-off
OPTIMISED: EDI/API integration; self-service enrolment; EOI workflow; eligibility/dependent verification; automated retro adjustments; catalog alignment 67% → 90%
